label: Binary Search (2D)
blurb: search by halving — repeatedly split a SORTED range in half to home in on a target (lookup, guessing games, dictionary/library search, divide-and-conquer).
classify: searching a SORTED range by halving (lookup, guessing, dictionary/library search, divide-and-conquer). Choose for find/lookup/guess concepts.
levelFormat: node.level = {values:[strictly-ascending ints],targetIndex:int,budget:int}. Theme has vocab{target,higher,lower,probeWord,hint} + visual{accent,actorIcon,coreIcon}; each node entry {title,hook,winText,failText?} with failText keys "not-halving" and "ignored-feedback". Node entries MAY also optionally carry learn:{frame?,reveal:{concept?,body,inTheWild?},insights?} (shell-sequenced frame→play→reveal beats, optional).
drillLevelFormat: For binary-search: node.level = {values:[strictly-ascending ints], targetIndex:int in range, budget?:int}. failText keys are "not-halving" and "ignored-feedback".
